data.name: Search.FetchingSpecs
data.value: Fetching official specs — more details loading…

data.name: Market.Prompt
data.value: We couldn't detect your market. Which country are you shopping in?

data.name: Search.CancelledHint
data.value: Your search was stopped. Edit the query and try again whenever you're ready.

data.name: Landing.Hero.Title
data.value: Find the best products, prices and deals in seconds

data.name: Landing.Hero.Subtitle
data.value: Daleel is your personal shopping assistant. Ask in plain English or Arabic to compare prices across stores, check brand reputation and catch the best deals — without the endless browser tabs.

data.name: Landing.Hero.NoCard
data.value: No credit card needed · 500 free credits every month

data.name: Landing.Features.Title
data.value: Everything you need to shop smarter

data.name: Landing.Features.Subtitle
data.value: One assistant for finding products, comparing prices and tracking the best deals.

data.name: Landing.Feature.Search.Desc
data.value: Ask in plain Arabic or English and get a clear, sourced answer in seconds.

data.name: Landing.Feature.Compare.Desc
data.value: See where a product is cheapest across local and international sellers.

data.name: Landing.Feature.Reputation.Desc
data.value: Real reviews and social sentiment, summarized for any brand.

data.name: Landing.Feature.Deals.Desc
data.value: Track the best offers and spot when prices drop over time.

data.name: Landing.Feature.Bilingual.Desc
data.value: A native experience in both English and Arabic, right-to-left.

data.name: Landing.Pricing.Subtitle
data.value: Start free. Upgrade when you need more searches.

data.name: Landing.Cta.Subtitle
data.value: Create a free account and run your first search in seconds.

data.name: Status.Subtitle
data.value: Live health of Daleel and the services it depends on.

data.name: Status.Degraded
data.value: Some services are degraded — searches may be slower or fail.

data.name: Faq.Subtitle
data.value: Everything you might want to know about Daleel.

data.name: Faq.A1
data.value: Daleel is a personal shopping assistant. Ask a question in plain English or Arabic and it searches stores, marketplaces and the open web to find products, compare prices, summarize brand reputation and surface the best deals — then gives you a clear, sourced answer.

data.name: Faq.A2
data.value: Both English and Arabic. You can ask in either language, switch the interface anytime, and the whole experience — including right-to-left layout — adapts automatically.

data.name: Faq.A3
data.value: Daleel applies a halal content filter by default: results and images that include alcohol, pork, gambling, adult or other non-halal content are removed so what you see stays family-friendly. You can adjust the strictness — or, for admin accounts, turn it off — under Content Filter in Settings.

data.name: Faq.A4
data.value: Yes — every account starts with 500 free credits each month, no credit card required. Each search spends credits based on the providers it uses, so a quick lookup costs little and a deep search costs more. If you need more, paid plans add larger monthly credit allowances, deal monitoring and saved results. See the Pricing page for details.

data.name: Faq.Q5
data.value: Do I need my own API keys?

data.name: Faq.A5
data.value: No. Daleel works out of the box. Power users can optionally add their own model and search provider keys under Settings — they stay in your browser and are never written to our server logs.

data.name: Faq.Q6
data.value: How is my search data used?

data.name: Faq.A6
data.value: Your personal search history is saved only for you, under your account. Separately, searches are analyzed anonymously to improve results — we record what was searched, the market, timing and cost, but never anything that identifies you. Analytics and cost logs carry only a one-way hash, so a search can't be traced back to your account.

data.name: Faq.Q7
data.value: How is a brand's reputation score calculated?

data.name: Faq.A7
data.value: Reputation is assessed for your specific market, not globally, and is grounded in live search and the brand's own pages — never invented. We weigh five factors: (1) reliability, (2) after-sales service and local service centres, (3) local warranty terms, (4) spare-parts availability, and (5) real user reviews from forums and social media. These produce a 1–5 score plus a badge. The badge rule is exact: "Strong local presence" = the brand has local service AND scores 4.0 or higher; "Limited local support" = no local service centre in your market (a cheap product from such a brand is usually a poor deal); otherwise no badge is shown. Local after-sales service is weighted heavily on purpose — without it, even a cheap, well-built product is a risk.

data.name: Footer.Privacy
data.value: Searches are analyzed anonymously to improve results.

data.name: Home.NoResults.Hint
data.value: Try rephrasing your search or searching again.

data.name: Home.SignInDialog.Body
data.value: Create a free account to run searches — you get 500 free credits every month.

data.name: Deals.Subtitle
data.value: Current prices, promotions and where to buy — ranked.

data.name: Compare.Subtitle
data.value: Two products, head-to-head, with local context and a verdict.

data.name: Stores.Subtitle
data.value: Find physical stores selling a product near a location (Google Places).

data.name: Stores.MapPreview
data.value: Map preview (Google Maps embed coming soon)

data.name: Brand.Subtitle
data.value: Presence, sentiment, stores and competitors for a brand in one market.

data.name: Monitor.Subtitle
data.value: Watch keywords across social platforms. "Run now" fetches matches via Apify when a token is set.

data.name: Results.NoneInCountry
data.value: No local products, stores, or brands were found for this search in {0}.

data.name: Results.NoMatch
data.value: No products match the current filters.

data.name: Progress.Msg.CacheHit
data.value: ⚡ Loaded from cache — an identical search ran recently.

data.name: Progress.Msg.Gathered
data.value: Gathered {0} web, {1} shopping and {2} store sources.

data.name: Progress.Msg.BuildingProfiles
data.value: Building profiles for {0} brand(s) and {1} store(s)…

data.name: Progress.Msg.Enriched
data.value: Enriched {0} brand(s); verified {1} store(s) on Google Maps.

data.name: Progress.Msg.LocatedLogoNoStorage
data.value: Located the {0} logo (object storage not configured).

data.name: Progress.Msg.LocatedLogoNoHost
data.value: Located the {0} logo (R2 images host not set — kept the source URL).

data.name: Progress.Msg.MergedSpecs
data.value: Merged {0} source(s) into {1} canonical spec(s) for {2}.

data.name: Progress.Msg.SavedFinalSpecs
data.value: Saved canonical spec sheet for {0} ({1} spec(s)).

data.name: History.Subtitle
data.value: Every query you run is saved here automatically. Re-run it or open a saved copy.

data.name: History.SignInPrompt
data.value: Sign in to save your searches.

data.name: History.Empty
data.value: No history yet — run a search to get started.

data.name: History.ClearDialog.Body
data.value: This permanently removes all of your search history.

data.name: Settings.CreditsHelp
data.value: Each search costs credits based on the providers it uses. Resets

data.name: Settings.Subtitle
data.value: Manage your search history and account.

data.name: Settings.DeleteAccountDesc
data.value: Permanently delete your account along with all of your search history and saved results. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings.DeleteDialog.Body
data.value: This permanently deletes your account, search history, and saved results. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings.PreferencesNote
data.value: Preferences apply instantly and persist in this browser.

data.name: Settings.FilterDesc
data.value: Filters alcohol, pork, gambling, adult, drugs from all results.

data.name: Settings.FilterDesc.Strict
data.value: Filters alcohol, pork, gambling, adult, drugs and tobacco content from all results. Stores are not filtered by their financing (e.g. interest-based plans).

data.name: Settings.FilterAdminNote
data.value: Turning the filter off requires an admin account.

data.name: Settings.NoTrustedDomains
data.value: None yet. Reveal an image and choose "Trust source".

data.name: Settings.Snack.KeysSaved
data.value: API keys saved to this browser.

data.name: Auth.Login.Subtitle
data.value: Sign in to keep your search history and saved results.

data.name: Auth.Register.Subtitle
data.value: Create your free account — you get 500 free credits every month.

data.name: Auth.PasswordHint
data.value: Use at least 8 characters with upper- and lower-case letters and a number.

data.name: Auth.PrivacyNote
data.value: Your search history is private to your account. Searches are also analyzed anonymously to improve results — never linked to your identity.

data.name: Auth.Error.Expired
data.value: Your session expired before the form was submitted. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.Error.Disabled
data.value: This account has been disabled. Contact support if you think this is a mistake.

data.name: Auth.Error.LockedOut
data.value: This account is locked out. Please try again later.

data.name: Auth.Error.Missing
data.value: Please enter both an email and a password.

data.name: Auth.Error.Duplicate
data.value: An account with that email already exists. Try signing in instead.

data.name: Auth.Error.WeakPassword
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters with upper- and lower-case letters and a number.

data.name: Auth.Error.Failed
data.value: We couldn't create your account. Please check your details and try again.

data.name: ProviderStatus.NoLlmKeyBefore
data.value: No LLM key configured. Add one on the

data.name: Admin.Usage.Subtitle
data.value: Every external action the search pipeline took — provider calls, scrapes, LLM completions, cache and profile lookups — with an estimated cost per provider. Sourced from the PostgreSQL event store.

data.name: Admin.Usage.NotConfiguredBefore
data.value: The event store isn't configured. Set

data.name: Admin.Usage.NotConfiguredAfter
data.value: ) to start recording provider usage and cost here.

data.name: Admin.Usage.RecentHint
data.value: The 50 most recent recorded actions, newest first.

data.name: Admin.Workflows.Subtitle
data.value: Live and recent search runs, reconstructed from the SearchJob queue and the pipeline event store. Click a run to see its step timeline.

data.name: Admin.Workflows.NoEventStore
data.value: The pipeline event store isn't configured, so per-step cost and the step timeline are unavailable. Running and completed runs are still listed from the job queue.

data.name: Admin.Workflows.RunningEmpty
data.value: No searches are running right now.

data.name: Admin.Workflows.CompletedEmpty
data.value: No completed searches in this period.

data.name: Admin.Workflows.DetailEmpty
data.value: No recorded steps for this run. Steps appear once a run finishes and its events are flushed to the store.

data.name: Admin.Data.Subtitle
data.value: Browse the R2 bucket by data type — scraped specs, brand and store images, and canonical spec sheets. Preview images and JSON inline, or download any object.

data.name: Admin.Data.PreviewTruncated
data.value: Preview truncated — download the file to see all of it.

data.name: Detail.SpecsUnavailable
data.value: Detailed specifications aren't available for this product yet.

data.name: Search.EmailNotice
data.value: We'll email you the results when they're ready.

data.name: Settings.EmailResultsHelp
data.value: Get a summary email when your search finishes.

data.name: Settings.Snack.EmailResultsOn
data.value: We'll email you when searches finish.

data.name: Email.Search.Subject
data.value: Your Daleel search results are ready

data.name: Email.Search.Preheader
data.value: Your search summary — the products, brands, and stores we found.

data.name: Email.Search.Intro
data.value: Here's a summary of what we found for:

data.name: Email.Search.FooterReason
data.value: You're receiving this because email notifications are on for your Daleel account.

data.name: Email.Search.FooterManage
data.value: Manage email preferences in your account settings.
